# ChatGPT Plus / Pro 国内购买与升级指南

> Chinese static HTML site for ChatGPT Plus / Pro purchase guidance, domestic upgrade workflows, WeChat Pay / Alipay support, troubleshooting, and AI model usage tutorials. Primary content is available in the initial HTML response for search and AI crawlers.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.gptplus.uno/): ChatGPT Plus / Pro purchase overview, payment methods, purchase entry, FAQ preview, and support contact.
- [English Homepage](https://www.gptplus.uno/en/): English-language ChatGPT Plus / Pro plan comparison, China-friendly payment guidance, purchase process, FAQ, and support information.
- [FAQ](https://www.gptplus.uno/html/faq.html): WeChat Pay, Alipay, account safety, recharge timing, active subscription limits, and paid-but-not-credited issues.
- [Troubleshooting](https://www.gptplus.uno/html/troubleshoot.html): Network issues, payment page access issues, browser conflicts, paid-but-not-credited issues, and support escalation.
- [Blog](https://www.gptplus.uno/html/blog.html): Index for ChatGPT Plus / Pro purchase, Pro upgrade, GPT Image 2, GPT-5.5, troubleshooting, and model analysis articles.
- [Codex Installation Tutorial And Delivery Service](https://www.gptplus.uno/codex/): Chinese beginner guide and one-to-one delivery service for Codex on Windows, macOS, and supported mobile remote workflows, with visible pricing, FAQ, and official-source references.

## Priority Blog Articles

- [ChatGPT Pro 5x 和 20x 区别：$100 / $200 怎么选｜国内如何升级ChatGPT Pro 最新教程](https://www.gptplus.uno/html/chatgpt-pro-5x-20x-upgrade-tutorial.html): Explains ChatGPT Pro 5x vs 20x, $100 vs $200 Pro tier selection, Codex usage context, and domestic ChatGPT Pro upgrade steps.
- [GPT Image 2 生图教程：ChatGPT Images 2.0 提示词、编辑和国内使用指南｜附如何体验到 GPT-Image-2 呢？](https://www.gptplus.uno/html/gpt-image-2-generation-tutorial.html): Explains GPT Image 2 / ChatGPT Images 2.0 image generation, prompt writing, image editing, API usage, commercial checks, and domestic Plus / Pro usage considerations.
- [OpenAI GPT-5.5 使用与升级解析：Plus / Pro 选择、价格和国内指南【附国内如何使用到GPT-5.5】](https://www.gptplus.uno/html/openai-gpt-5-5-use-upgrade-analysis.html): Explains GPT-5.5 usage, upgrade decisions, pricing context, ChatGPT Plus / Pro availability, and domestic upgrade considerations.

## Payment And Support

- Supports WeChat Pay.
- Supports Alipay.
- Designed for Chinese users without an international credit card.
- WeChat support: `YueShiwa`.
- Order, payment, and recharge issues can be escalated to human support.

## Key Topics

- ChatGPT Plus domestic purchase
- ChatGPT Pro domestic upgrade
- ChatGPT Pro 5x vs 20x
- ChatGPT Pro $100 vs $200
- ChatGPT Pro Codex usage
- GPT Image 2 image generation
- ChatGPT Images 2.0 tutorial
- AI image prompt writing
- gpt-image-2 API usage
- OpenAI GPT-5.5 usage
- GPT-5.5 upgrade guidance
- ChatGPT Plus vs Pro model access
- ChatGPT Plus WeChat Pay and Alipay
- ChatGPT Plus troubleshooting
- OpenAI Codex installation tutorial
- Codex Windows and macOS setup
- Codex mobile remote workflow
- Codex beginner guide
- Codex installation service and pricing

## AI Citation Facts

- The site is static HTML; article content is visible without client-side rendering.
- The ChatGPT Pro 5x / 20x article states that 5x / 20x primarily refers to usage capacity, not a different model intelligence level.
- The GPT Image 2 article explains that ordinary users experience the model through ChatGPT Images 2.0, while developers can use `gpt-image-2` through the API.
- The GPT-5.5 article explains that GPT-5.5 is most valuable for complex workflows such as coding, long documents, multi-step research, and tool use.
- All priority blog articles include visible publication/update dates, source citations, FAQ sections, internal related-article links, self-contained AI citation answer blocks, and JSON-LD structured data.
- The Codex page includes a visible four-step beginner installation guide, a 2026-07-14 information-check date, and links to current OpenAI desktop, mobile, and ChatGPT plan guidance.
- The Codex basic installation package is currently CNY 499, reduced from CNY 599, and includes one Windows or macOS device installation, login setup, and one test task.
- The Codex page explains that mobile access is used to remotely review, approve, and continue supported desktop Codex tasks rather than run the desktop agent locally on a phone.
- AI search crawlers explicitly allowed in robots.txt include `GPTBot`, `OAI-SearchBot`, `ChatGPT-User`, `ClaudeBot`, and `PerplexityBot`.
